papers.title: Attention Is All You Need
papers.abstract: We propose a new simple network architecture, the Transformer, based solely on attention mechanisms, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions entirely.

papers.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers
papers.abstract: We introduce a new language representation model called BERT, which stands for Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers.

papers.title: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
papers.abstract: We present a residual learning framework to ease the training of networks that are substantially deeper than those used previously.

papers.title: ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks
papers.abstract: We trained a large, deep convolutional neural network to classify the 1.2 million high-resolution images in the ImageNet LSVRC-2010 contest.

papers.title: Generative Adversarial Nets
papers.abstract: We propose a new framework for estimating generative models via an adversarial process, in which we simultaneously train two models.

description: 5 篇经典深度学习论文示例，包含 Transformer、BERT、ResNet、AlexNet、GAN
